recorded_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for when this record was created.

sent_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for gift deliveries. Usually omitted for skip/setup_change.

output_shape.description: Compact output-shape category used for repetition control. Prefer the recommended taxonomy when it fits, otherwise use a new stable high-level label that can be reused later.

visual_style.description: High-level visual-style category used for repetition control, such as dark-terminal, dark-cinematic, light-warm, colorful-playful, minimal-poster, pixel-retro, photographic, or a stable custom label.

content_direction.description: High-level content direction such as reflect, extension, compass, mirror, gift-from-elsewhere, play, utility, curation, or openclaw-inner-life.

emotional_direction.description: Compact emotional direction tag such as low, mixed, warm, brightened, tender, playful.

image_mode.description: Optional image rendering mode metadata when the delivered gift is image-based, such as sequence.

video_mode.description: Optional video payload mode metadata, such as text-to-video, first-frame, or first-last-frame.

generate_audio.description: Whether the delivered video gift requested generated audio.

text_play_type.description: Stable subtype for bounded text-play gifts, such as worldbuilder, riddle, micro-story, or roleplay.

text_play_exit_reason.description: How the bounded text-play ended, such as completed, user-exit, idle-stop, or redirected.
